title: Bits And Chiseled + Chiseled Me
body:
This is a mod pack that put together 2 mods and some more to make bits and chiseled + Chiseled me a good experience for all users. This Modpack includes.
the following: **Chisels and Bits**, **Chiseled Me**, ESSENTIAL Mod, Crosshair TXF, MC New Textures, MinecraftCapes and Default Dark Mode.
![Use Code Brorito for 25% off at Sparked Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472b11ada43915b87584f98e284e8a9e6642c671_0.webp)
